sessions.intent: Howard requested to extract fundamental CSS properties (colors, fonts, basic spacing) from a provided React component that uses Tailwind CSS and apply them to his `about.html` file using a separate, central CSS file.
sessions.decisions: A custom `styles.css` file was created to house the fundamental stylistic properties. This approach specifically addressed the challenge of `about.html` using the Tailwind CSS CDN, ensuring that `theme()` references would not break by carefully translating relevant styles without relying on direct Tailwind theme functions in the external CSS.
